title: Identify Available System Controls and Status Areas on the Viva Overview
summary: Use the Viva overview screen to locate the documented high-level control actions and visible status or metrics areas shown in the source. This runbook is for identifying screen regions and labels only, not for executing startup, shutdown, purge, bag out, resume, pause, or other control actions.
when_to_use: Use when a user needs to identify where the Viva main overview displays the right-hand control area, named system control actions, metrics or destination information, and AGV status areas on the overview screen.
not_for: Do not use this runbook to execute startup, shutdown, bag out, purge, resume, pause all AGVs, or Start/Stop system actions.
Do not assume undocumented meanings, button behavior, confirmation behavior, or control sequences from this source segment alone.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Open the Viva main overview and identify the documented controls and status areas visible on the screen.

safety_notes: This source segment is a screen-orientation reference only.
Do not perform control actions based on this runbook alone because the source identifies controls but does not provide execution steps.
If expected controls or status areas are not visible, escalate to verify screen version or access.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the Viva HMI main overview screen
Visual access to the right-hand control area
Visible metrics or destination information area

access_required: Access to the Viva HMI main overview screen
system_preconditions: The Viva main overview screen is open and visible.

visual_references.description: Training video frame showing the Viva overall system main overview screen and the primary navigation and right-hand control areas referenced by the source.

steps.title: Open the Viva main overview and focus on the right-hand control area
steps.purpose: Orient the user to the correct screen and the control region identified in the source.
steps.instruction: Open the Viva main overview screen and visually focus on the right-hand side control area shown on the overview.
steps.expected_result: The Viva main overview is visible and the right-hand control area can be identified.
steps.healthy_condition: The overview screen is visible as the home screen for system overview and navigation, and the right-hand side control area is present on screen.
steps.failure_condition: The Viva main overview is not visible, or the right-hand control area cannot be located on the displayed screen.

actions.label: Open overview screen
actions.exact_action: Open the Viva main overview screen.

actions.label: Inspect right-hand controls
actions.exact_action: Focus on the right-hand side control area on the overview.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Viva main overview home screen and the right-hand side control area.

stop_or_escalate_if: The displayed screen does not match the Viva main overview.
The right-hand control area is not visible.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Presenter says this is the Viva screens main overview from Hazlet; OCR states purpose is home screen for system overview and navigation.

steps.title: Locate the named control actions
steps.purpose: Identify the specific high-level control labels named in the source.
steps.instruction: On the right-hand control area, locate the control actions named in the source: startup, shutdown, bag out, purge, resume, and pause all AGVs.
steps.expected_result: The named control actions can be visually identified on the overview screen.
steps.healthy_condition: The right-hand control area shows the named controls documented by the presenter and OCR.
steps.failure_condition: One or more named controls cannot be found on the visible overview screen.

actions.label: Inspect named controls
actions.exact_action: Locate startup, shutdown, bag out, purge, resume, and pause all AGVs on the right-hand side of the overview.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The right-hand control list containing startup, shutdown, bag out, purge, resume, and pause all AGVs.

stop_or_escalate_if: Expected named controls are missing from the visible screen.
The screen appears to be a different version or access level than the one shown in the source.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Presenter identifies right-hand controls: startup, shutdown, bag out, purge, resume, pause all AGVs; OCR also mentions Start/Stop system and AGV status.

steps.title: Identify any Start/Stop system wording
steps.purpose: Confirm whether Start/Stop system wording is visible in the displayed overview content.
steps.instruction: Inspect the overview screen for any Start/Stop system wording shown in the displayed screen content, and note it only if it is visibly present.
steps.expected_result: Any visible Start/Stop system wording on the overview is identified.
steps.healthy_condition: Start/Stop system wording is either visibly present and identified, or its absence is noted without assumption.
steps.failure_condition: The user cannot determine whether Start/Stop system wording is present because the relevant area is not visible or readable.

actions.label: Inspect Start/Stop wording
actions.exact_action: Look for Start/Stop system wording on the overview if it is present in the displayed screen content.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Any Start/Stop system wording visible within the overview control area.

stop_or_escalate_if: The relevant screen area is not readable enough to confirm whether Start/Stop system wording is present.

steps.title: Locate the metrics or destination information area
steps.purpose: Identify the overview area referenced by the source for metrics or destination information.
steps.instruction: Locate the metrics or destination information area referenced by the source on the Viva overview screen.
steps.expected_result: The metrics or destination information area is visually identified on the overview.
steps.healthy_condition: A visible area corresponding to metrics or destination information can be pointed out on the overview screen.
steps.failure_condition: No metrics or destination information area can be identified on the visible overview screen.

actions.label: Inspect metrics or destination area
actions.exact_action: Locate the metrics or destination information area referenced by the source.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The overview area described as showing metrics or destinations.

stop_or_escalate_if: The metrics or destination information area is not visible on the current screen.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The slide references metrics or destinations on the overview.

steps.title: Locate the AGV status area
steps.purpose: Identify the AGV status area referenced by the source.
steps.instruction: Locate the AGV status area referenced by the source on the Viva overview screen.
steps.expected_result: The AGV status area is visually identified on the overview.
steps.healthy_condition: A visible AGV status area can be identified on the displayed overview screen.
steps.failure_condition: The AGV status area cannot be found on the visible overview screen.

actions.label: Inspect AGV status area
actions.exact_action: Locate the AGV status area referenced by the source.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The overview area referenced as AGV status.

stop_or_escalate_if: The AGV status area is not visible on the current screen.

steps.title: Record visible controls and status areas without assuming behavior
steps.purpose: Document what is actually visible on the current overview screen while staying within source-supported interpretation.
steps.instruction: Record which of the documented controls and status areas are visible on the current overview screen without assuming undocumented meanings or actions.
steps.expected_result: A source-grounded record exists of which controls and status areas are visible on the current screen.
steps.healthy_condition: Only visibly present controls and areas are recorded, and no unsupported action behavior or meaning is added.
steps.failure_condition: The record includes assumptions about control behavior, or expected controls and areas cannot be verified on the current screen.

actions.label: Record visible items
actions.exact_action: Record which documented controls and status areas are visible on the current overview screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Use the overview frame as the reference for what screen regions and labels are documented by the source.

stop_or_escalate_if: Expected controls or status areas are not visible and screen version or access may need verification.
You are being asked to perform a control action based only on this reference runbook.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: This is a procedural reference candidate for locating and interpreting screen areas, not for executing startup, shutdown, purge, or AGV control actions.
The source names the controls but does not provide source-backed button press sequences or confirmation behavior.

success_criteria: The user can identify the Viva main overview screen.
The right-hand control area is located.
The named controls documented by the source are identified if visible.
Metrics or destination information and AGV status areas are identified if visible.
Visible items are recorded without adding unsupported meanings or execution steps.
healthy_conditions: The Viva overview is visible as the home screen for system overview and navigation.
The right-hand control area is present.
Documented controls and status areas can be visually identified on the current screen.
failure_conditions: The Viva main overview cannot be opened or recognized.
The right-hand control area is missing or not visible.
Expected controls or status areas are not visible on the current screen.
The screen appears to be a different version or access level than the one shown in the source.
The user attempts to infer undocumented control behavior from this reference alone.
escalation_guidance: Escalate for help verifying screen version or user access if expected controls or status areas are not visible.

Escalate to a qualified support resource if execution of startup, shutdown, bag out, purge, resume, pause all AGVs, or Start/Stop system actions is requested, because this source does not provide execution steps.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Viva main overview screen, right-hand controls, metrics or destination area, and AGV status area.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: Presenter identifies right-hand controls: startup, shutdown, bag out, purge, resume, pause all AGVs; OCR also mentions Start/Stop system and AGV status.

missing_details: The source does not provide execution steps for startup, shutdown, bag out, purge, resume, pause all AGVs, or Start/Stop system.
The source does not provide confirmation behavior, expected button responses, or control prerequisites.
The source does not provide a time estimate.
The source does not define exact screen coordinates or exact labels beyond the documented wording captured in the packet.
